'''chavunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oldhood|oldhood]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oldhood|oldhood]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chavunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chævinith|chævinith]] || [[word:chævinij|chævinij]] || [[word:chævinish|chævinish]] || [[word:chævini|chævini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chavuvunuth|chavuvunuth]] || [[word:chavuvunuj|chavuvunuj]] || [[word:chavuvunush|chavuvunush]] || [[word:chavuvunu|chavuvunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chavunuth|chavunuth]] || [[word:chavunuj|chavunuj]] || [[word:chavunush|chavunush]] || [[word:chavunu|chavunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chavufnuth|chavufnuth]] || [[word:chavufnuj|chavufnuj]] || [[word:chavufnush|chavufnush]] || [[word:chavufnuf|chavufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chavunuthu|chavunuthu]] || [[word:chavunuju|chavunuju]] || [[word:chavunushu|chavunushu]] || [[word:chavunuku|chavunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chavunuth|chavunuth]] || [[word:chavunuj|chavunuj]] || [[word:chavunush|chavunush]] || [[word:chavunu|chavunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chavunuthul|chavunuthul]] || [[word:chavunujul|chavunujul]] || [[word:chavunushul|chavunushul]] || [[word:chavunukul|chavunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chavunuthuthu|chavunuthuthu]] || [[word:chavunujuju|chavunujuju]] || [[word:chavunushushu|chavunushushu]] || [[word:chavunuku|chavunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chavunuthun|chavunuthun]] || [[word:chavunujun|chavunujun]] || [[word:chavunushun|chavunushun]] || [[word:chavunukun|chavunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chavunuthuoro|chavunuthuoro]] || [[word:chavunujuoro|chavunujuoro]] || [[word:chavunushuoro|chavunushuoro]] || [[word:chavunukuoro|chavunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
